repository_ssim: St. Catherine's Monastery of the Sinai
contents_tesim: The parchment folios (ff. 1-103) contain the Pauline Epistles, incomplete at the beginning and end; the paper folios (ff. 104-198) contain Acts; the seven Catholic Epistles; and various liturgical excerpts
full_text_tesim: Milan, Biblioteca Ambrosiana, A 296 inf. (ff. 94-100 = Chabot 31)
Originally belonged together with the following

The parchment folios (ff. 1-103) contain the Pauline Epistles, incomplete at the beginning and end; the paper folios (ff. 104-198) contain Acts; the seven Catholic Epistles; and various liturgical excerpts
ex-Hiersemann 500/36 (= Tsu-Shi, Mie Prefecture, Japan, collection N. Yabuuchi)
